name: Use of Hard-coded, Security-relevant Constants
description: The software uses hard-coded constants rather than symbolic names for security-critical values such as cryptographic keys, permission masks, or access thresholds. This makes maintenance error-prone and risks exposing security values if source code is disclosed.
detection_pattern: META[hardcoded_constant] within STRUCTURAL[source_code] that is referenced by AUTH, CONTROL, or TRANSFORM nodes for security decisions. Security-relevant literal values embedded directly rather than loaded from STORAGE[config] or META[symbolic_constant].
